item.title: GOG anti-censorship giveaway for another 18 hours
item.description: Imgur haven't seemed to like me posting things with hyperlinks to shops and a few other sources, but if you just go to the GOG site you'll find it. It seems this doesn't work in Germany or Australia, but here is a fix posted by @GuerrillaschaukelnInDerTodeszone : https://www.gog.com/forum/general/freedom_to_buy_games_bundle_workaround_for_australians_and_germans Edit: Somehow managed to read that as 18 hours...whoops
item.dc:creator: ColmCorbec

item.title: Let's Not Forget This Kid
item.description: This awesome individual, Riley Howell, knocked down an active shooter in his anthropology class at University North Carolina in 2019. Although he was killed in the process, along with another student, he possibly saved more lives. He was in ROTC and wished to join the military after college. I forget about him in all the noise, and then something will remind me about what true sacrifice looks like. Something about this picture made me want to always remember him. To remember his act and sacrifice and always honor that. I looked him up and found out he was buried with full military honors and was awarded the Civilian Medal Of Honor, the highest medal awarded to non military , as well as a character in a Star Wars book. I'm sorry I forgot about you for awhile Riley. Toast you tonight with a little mezcal and sincerely thank you.
item.dc:creator: ChicanoBatman

item.title: Gardening [OC]
item.description:
Guess who finally got herself an allotment??? I DID!!! After four years on the waiting list, and 8 years without a garden (or even a balcony for that matter) I AM FINALLY FREEEEEE!! I love plants, and anything garden related, I am absolutely elated!! What about you? Do you love gardening or do you prefer keeping your hands mud free?
Cat tax time!! It’s Beany, giving you the sniff test
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

#27

item.dc:creator: UnattendedDeviant

item.title: We’re boned, as a planet
item.description:
Saw this headline, couldn’t stop myself from reading it all. Now I share it. We’re screwed as a species.
Cap wealth at 10 million, then get a plaque that says you beat capitalism in X many years, months, days. We shouldn’t be discriminating each other, we should be discriminating the rich.
Even if we fail, at the very least we didn’t contribute to the problem.
item.dc:creator: Firestar002

item.title: Cakeday !
item.description:
Does last decade count ?
Been single for a long time, i think i might be the one.
I guess ..
A fully functional body is sadly not on the list
!!
*It's been a while*
Elmo holds the camera
Fair enough, Counter-Strike, Final Fantasy, C&C
Been there
I'd love to try that prank, but i would need a friend for that >.<
Vroom Vroom
He's not wrong though
I sense a theme.....
I always wondered about that, Disney and killing parents ...
It has to be a small leak
I had a few bosses like that
Leaky boat .....
I'm not THAT desperate !
Run !
This is how Skynet could win
Never Gonna............
What about Birria ?
Depends on the price ?
Did not happen to me !
Link ?
Classic !
I know a few people that are that Ugly ........
Snu Snu
Date... ?
Same ..........
Black Forest Cake Cakeday !! https://natashaskitchen.com/black-forest-cake-recipe Most Viral TY !!!!
item.dc:creator: SouYuck

item.title: Believe people when they show you who they are.
item.dc:creator: Az663

item.title: The FBI Redacted Trump’s Name in the Epstein files. But their job is to prosecute, not bury it.
item.description: The bureau’s FOIA team tasked with conducting a final review of the records blacked out the names before higher-ups said last month that releasing the documents ‘would not be appropriate or warranted.’
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas
